@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1200" height="760" viewBox="0 0 1200 760">
+  <defs>
+    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
+      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f4efe7" />
+      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f6d6c4" />
+    </linearGradient>
+  </defs>
+  <rect width="1200" height="760" rx="32" fill="url(#bg)" />
+  <rect x="60" y="70" width="1080" height="620" rx="26" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#1f1f1f" stroke-width="2" />
+  <g fill="#1f1f1f" font-family="IBM Plex Mono, monospace" font-size="28">
+    <text x="120" y="170">Screenshot coming soon</text>
+  </g>
+  <g fill="#ff6b2d">
+    <rect x="120" y="220" width="180" height="16" rx="8" />
+    <rect x="120" y="260" width="420" height="10" rx="5" opacity="0.7" />
+    <rect x="120" y="290" width="360" height="10" rx="5" opacity="0.6" />
+  </g>
+</svg>
